# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent kong plugin misconfiguration.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "2.1"

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app.example.com
        - https://admin.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
        - X-Requested-With
        - Accept
        - Origin
        - User-Agent
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Response-Time
        - X-Request-ID
      max_age: 3600
      credentials: true
    enabled: true

  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_in_body: false
      key_in_header: true
      key_name: apikey
      hide_credentials: true
      anonymous: ""
    enabled: true

  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 1000
      hour: 10000
      policy: local
      fault_tolerant: true
      redis_host: redis
      redis_port: 6379
      redis_password: ""
      redis_database: 0
      redis_timeout: 2000
    enabled: true

services:
  - name: example-service
    url: http://backend-service:8000
    routes:
      - name: example-route
        paths:
          - /api/*
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
              headers:
                - Content-Type
              credentials: true
            enabled: true
          - name: key-auth
            enabled: true
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 500
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
            enabled: true

  - name: secure-service
    url: http://secure-backend:8000
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - https://app.example.com
            - https://admin.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - DELETE
          headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization
            - X-Requested-With
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Response-Time
          max_age: 3600
          credentials: true
        enabled: true
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_in_body: false
          key_in_header: true
          key_name: apikey
          hide_credentials: true
          anonymous: ""
        enabled: true
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 2000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
        enabled: true

  - name: public-service
    url: http://public-backend:8000
    routes:
      - name: public-route
        paths:
          - /public/*
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
              headers:
                - Content-Type
              credentials: false
            enabled: true
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 1000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
            enabled: true

  - name: internal-service
    url: http://internal-backend:8000
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_in_body: false
          key_in_header: true
          key_name: apikey
          hide_credentials: true
          anonymous: ""
        enabled: true
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 5000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
        enabled: true
